user_query: 2023年所有区域中，哪些区域在1-6月期间的平均出口同比增速高于3%？
question: 2023年所有区域中，哪些区域在1-6月期间的平均出口同比增速高于3%？
ground_truth_sql:
SELECT geo_name, AVG(export_yoy_pct) AS avg_export_yoy
FROM trade_balance
WHERE year = 2023 AND geo_level = 'region' AND month BETWEEN 1 AND 6
GROUP BY geo_name
HAVING AVG(export_yoy_pct) > 3
ORDER BY avg_export_yoy DESC

ORDER BY year, quarter
